title: ProDec 1.5 inch Premier Trade Professional Synthetic Long Handle Cutting In Paint Brush for Sharp Edge Lines Painting with Emulsion, Gloss, Satin Paints on Walls, Ceilings, Wood and Metal, 1.5" 38mm
features: Ideal for water-based paints including emulsions (eg. matt, silk, eggshell), gloss and satin, as well as woodstains and varnishes
Slant cut head gives the optimum angle against the surface for cutting in edges on walls and ceilings and against woodwork
Top quality pure synthetic filaments for smooth paint release and a superb trade finish with minimal brush marks
Shaped wooden handle for maximum comfort even during extended use
1.5" (38mm) size for cutting in corners, edges and around architraves, skirting and window frames with emulsion paint, as well as painting them with gloss or satin
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Premier - for a top quality trade finish Get a superb trade finish with Premier - a top quality professional paint and varnish brush made with the finest synthetic filaments for excellent paint pick up and smooth release. Featuring a full bodied head for optimum paint holding set in a rust-resistant, stainless steel ferrule, Premier is ideal for all paints and is especially suited to water-based paints including emulsions (eg. matt, silk, eggshell), gloss and satin. With a shaped, carefully balanced wooden handle it's comfortable to use even for long periods and storing it in the shaped cardboard keeper will ensure it remains in top condition time after time. The handle has a hanging hole for storage, which is also a great way to dry the brush after washing and let gravity do the work, helping it maintain its shape ready for next use. Top quality pure synthetic filaments Premier is made using carefully selected solid round tapered (SRT) filaments for the right blend of stiffness and durability. They load and release the paint smoothly and the tapered ends give a featherlight touch for a superb trade finish with minimal brush marks. Trade quality full bodied head Premier holds the optimum amount of paint, maximising each stroke and reducing the rate at which you need to reload, for more efficient painting to get the job done quicker. Excellent with emulsion paints Puts down the right amount of paint to give excellent coverage and enables you to achieve sharp cutting lines for a high quality finish. Superb with gloss and satin paints Minimal brush marks allows the paint to flow out for a smooth gloss or satin finish on wood and metal. Choosing the right paint brush Remember to select your brush size based on the task. Here's a quick guide to how professional decorators most often choose: 0.5" (12mm) for detail work and hard to reach areas 1" (25mm) for small jobs and touch-up work 1.5" (38mm) for architrave, skirting, panels, window frames and furniture 2" (50mm) for cutting in edges on walls and ceilings, doors, cabinets and railings 2.5" (63mm) for cutting in edges on walls and ceilings, doors and cabinets 3" (75mm) for cutting in edges on walls and ceilings, wide trim, fascia boards and steps 4" (100mm) for fast coverage of larger areas and laying off (smoothing) rolled gloss paints
